message:
test: add comprehensive test coverage across 9 packages

Expand unit and integration test coverage for core NTM subsystems,
adding ~3,600 lines of new test code targeting previously uncovered
edge cases and integration paths.

CLI tests (internal/cli/):
- spawn_test.go: add Ollama preflight tests covering model-present,
  missing-model-json-mode, missing-model-interactive-pull, and
  interactive-decline paths with httptest servers
- assign_pure_test.go: pure function tests for agent assignment logic
  including round-robin, affinity, and capacity overflow scenarios
- modes_test.go: test mode parsing, validation, and transition logic
- orchestration_pure_test.go: test orchestration state machine
  transitions, timeout handling, and error recovery paths

Git tests (internal/git/):
- worktree_test.go: add ~450 lines covering NewWorktreeManager,
  parseWorktreeList edge cases (empty, whitespace, no-agent, multiple
  agents, detached HEAD, agent name extraction, non-existent paths),
  and integration tests for provision/list/remove lifecycle
- service_test.go: test git service initialization and repo detection

Worktree management (internal/worktrees/):
- manager_test.go: add ~400 lines testing manager initialization,
  cleanup policies, stale detection, and concurrent access patterns

TUI dashboard (internal/tui/dashboard/):
- local_perf_test.go: add tests for LocalPerfTracker default window,
  invalid delta handling, OllamaHost env priority/normalization/
  fallback, and fetchOllamaPS error paths

Session + Robot (internal/session/, internal/robot/):
- capture_test.go: test session capture, truncation, and encoding
- prompts_extra_test.go: test prompt template expansion edge cases
- classify_test.go: test robot message classification accuracy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
